creator: ganael.laplanche@martymac.com
text:
Hi again,

Here is an additional file to add to the files/ directory. It is a patch against
script.c to be able to successfully run a module script using vlock, e.g. :

vlock -n amarok

Without this script, we get the following error :

vlock: stdin is not a terminal

Best regards,

Ganaël LAPLANCHE
ganael.laplanche@martymac.com
http://www.martymac.com
